TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Hamaybaki, title = Hamaybaki, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hamaybaki} }

S.FORM: u Hamabaki a lisin nu Sakizaya sa, i kalalikidan a demiad, pasisien nu babalikid tu tunuz, titi nu ayam atu alipatu ku wawa, palemed tu mamiselea a wawa. sakakalamekam a malahad a miducus tu kakaselal a midiput tu niyazu'. u babalaki nu niyazu' ku pacakatay tu cacay a selalan. u kakaselal ku pasibana'ay tu sabaselal a malatanektekay a adipel nu niyazu'. i kasilisinan nu niyazu' sa, mahaen u pihamaybakian ku babalaki pasisi tu kakaenen, palemed a pasibana' tu sakalatadem nu kauzip nu wawa. misasdabek u Ciwidiyan a niyazu' sa, i baluhay a hehecaan a misadabek ku papacakaten a miselalay a wawa. liliden nu kakaselal misanga' tu dabek, minanam mililid ku kakaselal tu sabaselel. kalahukan pasisien nu babalaki ku miselalay a wawa tu tuzuz, titi nu ayam atu alipatu, palemed a pasibana' tu sakalatademaw nu uzip. Simawen nu selal, langaten nu selal ku niyazu, caay pidebung ku lais, kiyu yadah ku nisamihecaan, malemed ku piadup nu babalaki i buyubuyu'an. sisa, satabutabu han nu babalaki ku kimit nu tuzuz atu titi nu ayam tu sapasisi i wawa nu binawlan. Pihamaybakian sa, "Ami-bigi" sa ku wawa i zikuzan nu babalaki, miamay tu sapalemed nu babalaki. Pakaynien nu babaki i lisin ku pasibana' tu, "Amana maidi tu kaen" atu "kabana' tu nika u langat nu niyazu' ku sela" sanay a selangawan nu Sakizaya.
S.PHON: u ńßamabaki a r~…ĺisin nu sakizaja sa, i kar~…ĺar~…ĺikidan a d…ômiad, pasisi…ôn nu babar~…ĺikid tu tunuz, titi nu ajam atu ar~…ĺipatu ku wawa, par~…ĺ…ôm…ôd tu mamis…ôr~…ĺ…ôa a wawa. sakakar~…ĺam…ôkam a mar~…ĺańßad a midu ¶us tu kakas…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺ a midiput tu nijazu Ē~ °. u babar~…ĺaki nu nijazu Ē~ ° ku pa ¶akataj tu ¶a ¶aj a s…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺan. u kakas…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺ ku pasibana Ē~ °aj tu sabas…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺ a mar~…ĺatan…ôkt…ôkaj a adip…ôr~…ĺ nu nijazu Ē~ °. i kasir~…ĺisinan nu nijazu Ē~ ° sa, mańßa…ôn u pińßamajbakian ku babar~…ĺaki pasisi tu kaka…ôn…ôn, par~…ĺ…ôm…ôd a pasibana Ē~ ° tu sakar~…ĺatad…ôm nu kauzip nu wawa. misasdab…ôk u ¶iwidijan a nijazu Ē~ ° sa, i bar~…ĺuńßaj a ńß…ôńß…ô ¶aan a misadab…ôk ku papa ¶akat…ôn a mis…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺaj a wawa. r~…ĺir~…ĺid…ôn nu kakas…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺ misaŇča Ē~ ° tu dab…ôk, minanam mir~…ĺir~…ĺid ku kakas…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺ tu sabas…ôr~…ĺ…ôr~…ĺ. kar~…ĺańßukan pasisi…ôn nu babar~…ĺaki ku mis…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺaj a wawa tu tuzuz, titi nu ajam atu ar~…ĺipatu, par~…ĺ…ôm…ôd a pasibana Ē~ ° tu sakar~…ĺatad…ômaw nu uzip. simaw…ôn nu s…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺ, r~…ĺaŇčat…ôn nu s…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺ ku nijazu, ¶aaj pid…ôbuŇč ku r~…ĺais, kiju jadańß ku nisamińß…ô ¶aan, mar~…ĺ…ôm…ôd ku piadup nu babar~…ĺaki i bujubuju Ē~ °an. sisa, satabutabu ńßan nu babar~…ĺaki ku kimit nu tuzuz atu titi nu ajam tu sapasisi i wawa nu binawr~…ĺan. pińßamajbakian sa, "ami-bigi" sa ku wawa i zikuzan nu babar~…ĺaki, miamaj tu sapar~…ĺ…ôm…ôd nu babar~…ĺaki. pakajni…ôn nu babaki i r~…ĺisin ku pasibana Ē~ ° tu, "amana maidi tu ka…ôn" atu "kabana Ē~ ° tu nika u r~…ĺaŇčat nu nijazu Ē~ ° ku s…ôr~…ĺa" sanaj a s…ôr~…ĺaŇčawan nu sakizaja.
S.FORM: u Hamabaki a lisin nu Sakizaya sa, i kalalikidan a demiad, pasisien nu babalikid tu tunuz, titi nu ayam atu alipatu ku wawa, palemed tu mamiselea a wawa. sakakalamekam a malahad a miducus tu kakaselal a midiput tu niyazu'. u babalaki nu niyazu' ku pacakatay tu cacay a selalan. u kakaselal ku pasibana'ay tu sabaselal a malatanektekay a adipel nu niyazu'. i kasilisinan nu niyazu' sa, mahaen u pihamaybakian ku babalaki pasisi tu kakaenen, palemed a pasibana' tu sakalatadem nu kauzip nu wawa. misasdabek u Ciwidiyan a niyazu' sa, i baluhay a hehecaan a misadabek ku papacakaten a miselalay a wawa. liliden nu kakaselal misanga' tu dabek, minanam mililid ku kakaselal tu sabaselel. kalahukan pasisien nu babalaki ku miselalay a wawa tu tuzuz, titi nu ayam atu alipatu, palemed a pasibana' tu sakalatademaw nu uzip. Simawen nu selal, langaten nu selal ku niyazu, caay pidebung ku lais, kiyu yadah ku nisamihecaan, malemed ku piadup nu babalaki i buyubuyu'an. sisa, satabutabu han nu babalaki ku kimit nu tuzuz atu titi nu ayam tu sapasisi i wawa nu binawlan. Pihamaybakian sa, "Ami-bigi" sa ku wawa i zikuzan nu babalaki, miamay tu sapalemed nu babalaki. Pakaynien nu babaki i lisin ku pasibana' tu, "Amana maidi tu kaen" atu "kabana' tu nika u langat nu niyazu' ku sela" sanay a selangawan nu Sakizaya.
S.PHON: u ńßamabaki a r~…ĺisin nu sakizaja sa, i kar~…ĺar~…ĺikidan a d…ômiad, pasisi…ôn nu babar~…ĺikid tu tunuz, titi nu ajam atu ar~…ĺipatu ku wawa, par~…ĺ…ôm…ôd tu mamis…ôr~…ĺ…ôa a wawa. sakakar~…ĺam…ôkam a mar~…ĺańßad a midu ¶us tu kakas…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺ a midiput tu nijazu Ē~ °. u babar~…ĺaki nu nijazu Ē~ ° ku pa ¶akataj tu ¶a ¶aj a s…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺan. u kakas…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺ ku pasibana Ē~ °aj tu sabas…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺ a mar~…ĺatan…ôkt…ôkaj a adip…ôr~…ĺ nu nijazu Ē~ °. i kasir~…ĺisinan nu nijazu Ē~ ° sa, mańßa…ôn u pińßamajbakian ku babar~…ĺaki pasisi tu kaka…ôn…ôn, par~…ĺ…ôm…ôd a pasibana Ē~ ° tu sakar~…ĺatad…ôm nu kauzip nu wawa. misasdab…ôk u ¶iwidijan a nijazu Ē~ ° sa, i bar~…ĺuńßaj a ńß…ôńß…ô ¶aan a misadab…ôk ku papa ¶akat…ôn a mis…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺaj a wawa. r~…ĺir~…ĺid…ôn nu kakas…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺ misaŇča Ē~ ° tu dab…ôk, minanam mir~…ĺir~…ĺid ku kakas…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺ tu sabas…ôr~…ĺ…ôr~…ĺ. kar~…ĺańßukan pasisi…ôn nu babar~…ĺaki ku mis…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺaj a wawa tu tuzuz, titi nu ajam atu ar~…ĺipatu, par~…ĺ…ôm…ôd a pasibana Ē~ ° tu sakar~…ĺatad…ômaw nu uzip. simaw…ôn nu s…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺ, r~…ĺaŇčat…ôn nu s…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺ ku nijazu, ¶aaj pid…ôbuŇč ku r~…ĺais, kiju jadańß ku nisamińß…ô ¶aan, mar~…ĺ…ôm…ôd ku piadup nu babar~…ĺaki i bujubuju Ē~ °an. sisa, satabutabu ńßan nu babar~…ĺaki ku kimit nu tuzuz atu titi nu ajam tu sapasisi i wawa nu binawr~…ĺan. pińßamajbakian sa, "ami-bigi" sa ku wawa i zikuzan nu babar~…ĺaki, miamaj tu sapar~…ĺ…ôm…ôd nu babar~…ĺaki. pakajni…ôn nu babaki i r~…ĺisin ku pasibana Ē~ ° tu, "amana maidi tu ka…ôn" atu "kabana Ē~ ° tu nika u r~…ĺaŇčat nu nijazu Ē~ ° ku s…ôr~…ĺa" sanaj a s…ôr~…ĺaŇčawan nu sakizaja.
